examples: Encephalitis still attacks one child in 1,000 who catches measles.
Antibiotics is extensively used in the patients suffered with viral encephalitis without indications prophylactically or remedially.
The dengue virus causes dengue hemorrhagic fever, shock and encephalitis.
In a very small number of cases, inflammation of the brain (encephalitis) may follow.
Dahl's eldest daughter Olivia died aged seven after catching measles, which progressed to become encephalitis.
